rulings.Case Title: CAMPBELL VS FIRESIDE THRIFT CO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Not Of Mot And Mot Of Objector Lewis For Award Of Attorneys'Fees,Costs And Expenses;Proof Of Service By Messenger;Mp&As;Decl Of Mark A.Chavez In Support
rulings.Rulings: COURT AWARDS ATTORNEY CLAIMANT FEES IN PROPORTION TO AMOUNT CLAIMED, LEWIS OBJECTORS $123,739.70 (55% OF $225,000) AND $101,260.30 FOR CAMPBELL COUNSEL (45% OF $225,000). COURT FINDS IT HAS NO AUTHORITY UNDER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS AND ITS APPROVAL TO INCREASE AMOUNT OVER FIRESIDE OBJECTIONS TO MORE THAN TOTAL OF $225,000. (JH)
